title: Looking for Teacher at Extramarks Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Extramarks Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Extramarks Holdings Services in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Extramarks Holdings Services:
Extramarks Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks Holdings Services!
